columns.extraction_plan: Extracted from the text on Page 1, Summary, Background, Methods, and Interpretation sections. The treatments are classified as Androgen Deprivation Therapy (ADT), Docetaxel (chemotherapy), Second-generation hormonal therapy / androgen receptor axis inhibitors (specifically abiraterone plus prednisone), Radiotherapy, and Triple systemic therapy (a combination of ADT, docetaxel, and abiraterone/prednisone).
